title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kuzan, Garp, Unknown person #2, Blackbeard, Luffy as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The stars outside shine almost as beautifully as you, Nami-san.@7 Would you like to come watch them with me? - Sony

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks, but I saw them earlier. - No.

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Missing in action on pirate Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no need to worry about him, he's a living legend.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: S-Sorry! I didn't realize it was you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess we're all a little on edge over GARP- San...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The baby's even starting to recognize Luffy's face from all the photos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really love seeing big bro luffy, don't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: Garp, Luffy... What are you doing...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... matched the one felt on that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It caused untold destruction across the entire world.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
